name: Ignis the Magmasmith
dialogue: Ignis. Last of the Master's three.
Stone holds. Crystal sees. Fire MOVES. Hesitate down here and the magma takes you.
preBattleLine: Ignis's hands ignite. The cave walls glow red.
postDefeatDialogue: Ignis cools the room with a wave of his hand.
"You're ready. Master Vorgath’s waiting at the back of the chamber."
